name: [GUIDE] Enable 4g+/LTE-A Carrier Aggregation without Root on Stock
snippet: Type adb devices and press enter. Type adb shell and press enter. Type su and press enter. Type setprop sys.usb.config diag,adb and press enter. name: How to stop a 4G Plus network and use a normal 4G network - Quora
snippet: Enable Developer options > Dial *#*#3646633#*#* Then go to LTE CA option Select OFF Then Press SET now 4G+ is disabled in your phone.
